title: bupleurum capitatum
intro: Bupleurum capitatum, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum capitatum include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating liver and gallbladder disorders. Bupleurum capitatum is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
